2309510.name: Orb Raid
2309510.description:
Step into the chaos of Orb Raid, where every bullet, blade, and explosion shapes the battlefield! Arm yourself with a devastating arsenal: shred enemies with machine guns, outsmart foes with tactical shotguns, or rain destruction via missile launchers and grenades. Deploy landmines for deadly traps, fortify positions with barricades—every move is a step toward domination.

Dive into frenetic Team Deathmatches, strategize in Search & Destroy to plant or defuse C4, seize glory in Capture The Flag, or conquer vast zones in Large Conquest. Customize your mercenary with unique gear, skins, and weapon mods—craft a killer identity that strikes fear into rivals.

Create custom matches to challenge friends, test new tactics, or unleash pure mayhem. Adapt, outgun, and rise as the ultimate Renegade.
2309510.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 繁体中文, 韩语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 意大利语
